response.overview: A Shared Dream follows the remarkable journey of Paro FC, a football club from the small Himalayan kingdom of Bhutan, as they unite a community around a common vision — proving that passion, teamwork, and belief can transcend geography and circumstance. The documentary captures the hopes, struggles, and triumphs of players and fans who dare to dream big from the roof of the world.
response.title: Paro FC: A Shared Dream
